docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,490.00 FILED BY MARTINEZ, J DBA MEX EXPRESS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MUNOZ, ALEJANDRO DBA  MUNOZ CLEANING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SEE SERVICE - INFORMATION ALSO IN SUBSTITUTED SERVICE FIELD. NO FEE FOR SERVICE. SERVED SEP-19-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MUNOZ, ALEJANDRO DBA  MUNOZ CLEANING

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
